name: SystemIntegrationGuidanceContracts
description: Provider-neutral schema discovery and optional explicit installation of version-matched integration guidance.
schema_def: system.schema.list returns operation IDs, CLI paths, kind, versions, and schema digests. system.schema.show returns one complete provider-neutral request, result, error, and example contract. system.version reports executable, contract, storage, and reconciliation policy versions. system.guidance.list lists optional embedded provider guidance and compatibility. system.guidance.check compares an installed bundle with the executable. system.guidance.install explicitly publishes one versioned embedded bundle through private staging and atomic rename. Core operation discovery and invocation require no skill. Guidance cannot add operations, relax validation, or introduce provider or transport fields into public schemas.
